Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
187 
ORDRG_PRVDR_ID 
LABEL: 
Ordering Provider Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: The Medicaid provider ID of the provider who requested the service or items being reported on this 
service line. 
SHORT NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_ID 
LONG NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
30 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT header 

VALUES: 
State Assigned Identifier
